talking_points.label: Illegal and Unconstitutional War
talking_points.premise: Trump launched strikes without congressional authorization, violating Article I, Section 8 of the Constitution which grants Congress alone the power to declare war.
supporting_arguments: The War Powers Resolution requires congressional approval within 60 days
No imminent threat justified immediate action
Pattern of executive overreach on war powers
common_phrases: Congress alone has the power to declare war

talking_points.label: No Evidence of Imminent Threat
talking_points.premise: Democrats with intelligence access say the administration presented no evidence of an imminent threat justifying preemptive strikes.
supporting_arguments: Intel Committee members saw no imminent strike evidence
Pentagon offered no evidence to Congress
Definition of 'imminent' stretched beyond legal meaning
common_phrases: doesn't meet the definition of imminence
talking_points.target_audience: Security-focused voters, moderates, skeptics of government claims

talking_points.label: Iraq War Parallel
talking_points.premise: This is Iraq 2.0 - the American people are being lied to again just as they were about Vietnam and Iraq.
supporting_arguments: Same pattern of urgent claims and distorted evidence
common_phrases: weapons of mass destruction all over again
talking_points.target_audience: Anti-war voters, those who opposed Iraq War, millennials/Gen Z

talking_points.label: Netanyahu's War
talking_points.premise: Trump is gambling with American lives to fulfill Netanyahu's decades-long ambition of dragging the US into war with Iran.
supporting_arguments: Israel drove the timing and decision
US delegated war decision to another country
common_phrases: war of choice dictated by Israel

talking_points.label: Domestic Priorities Over War
talking_points.premise: Resources being spent on war should address Americans' needs at home - healthcare, housing, education.
supporting_arguments: Cutting domestic programs while spending on war
Americans want jobs and healthcare, not war
common_phrases: health care and housing they can afford

talking_points.label: Iran Nuclear Threat Was Real
talking_points.premise: Iran was pursuing nuclear weapons and posed a genuine threat to US interests and allies that required military action.
supporting_arguments: Active nuclear weapons program unlike Iraq
216+ attacks on US forces since October 2023
talking_points.target_audience: National security voters, pro-Israel voters, conservatives

talking_points.label: This Is Not Iraq
talking_points.premise: Iran has an actual verified nuclear program unlike Iraq which had nothing - the comparison is false.
supporting_arguments: Iraq had dismantled program; Iran has active centrifuges
Iran has killed 608 Americans via proxy weapons
Iran is world's largest state terror sponsor
talking_points.target_audience: Skeptics of Iraq comparison, moderates, security voters

talking_points.label: Democrats Side With Ayatollah
talking_points.premise: Democrats opposing the war are effectively siding with Iran's regime against American interests.
supporting_arguments: War Powers Resolution protects the regime
Democrats would let Iran get nuclear weapons

talking_points.label: Pathway to Citizenship
talking_points.premise: The 11 million undocumented immigrants already here should have a pathway to legal status and eventual citizenship.
supporting_arguments: Many have lived here for decades and are part of communities
Deportation of all would be economically devastating
DACA recipients are Americans in every way but paper

talking_points.label: Asylum Is Legal
talking_points.premise: Seeking asylum is a legal right under US and international law - it is not illegal to come to the border and request protection.
supporting_arguments: Fleeing violence and persecution is not a crime
talking_points.target_audience: Human rights advocates, religious voters, progressives

talking_points.label: Border Invasion
talking_points.premise: The southern border is experiencing an invasion that threatens national security, public safety, and American jobs.
talking_points.target_audience: Border state voters, security voters, working class

talking_points.label: Finish The Wall
talking_points.premise: Physical barriers work and the border wall must be completed to secure America.

talking_points.label: Mass Deportation Now
talking_points.premise: All illegal immigrants must be removed from the country - the largest deportation operation in American history.
supporting_arguments: Rule of law must be enforced

talking_points.label: Codify Roe
talking_points.premise: Congress must codify Roe v. Wade protections into federal law to restore reproductive freedom nationwide.
supporting_arguments: Majority of Americans support abortion access
State bans are extreme and dangerous
Women are dying due to delayed care
Privacy and bodily autonomy are fundamental rights
talking_points.target_audience: Women voters, suburban voters, young voters

talking_points.label: Abortion Is Healthcare
talking_points.premise: Abortion is essential healthcare that should be decided between a woman and her doctor, not politicians.
supporting_arguments: Doctors need to make decisions without legal fear
Bans don't stop abortions, just safe ones
common_phrases: between a woman and her doctor

talking_points.label: Pro-Life Protection
talking_points.premise: Life begins at conception and unborn children deserve legal protection from abortion.
supporting_arguments: Science shows unique human DNA at conception
talking_points.target_audience: Religious conservatives, evangelical voters, Catholic voters

talking_points.label: Let States Decide
talking_points.premise: Dobbs correctly returned abortion to the states where voters can decide through the democratic process.

talking_points.label: Climate Existential Crisis
talking_points.premise: Climate change is an existential threat requiring immediate, dramatic action to avoid catastrophe.
supporting_arguments: Sea level rise threatens coastal cities

talking_points.label: Green Jobs Economy
talking_points.premise: Climate action creates good-paying jobs and economic opportunity through clean energy investment.
supporting_arguments: Clean energy jobs pay well and can't be outsourced

talking_points.label: Climate Hoax / Scam
talking_points.premise: Climate change is exaggerated or fabricated to justify government control and destroy American energy.
talking_points.target_audience: MAGA base, energy workers, rural voters

talking_points.label: Energy Independence / Drill Baby Drill
talking_points.premise: America should maximize domestic fossil fuel production for energy independence, lower prices, and jobs.
talking_points.target_audience: Energy workers, rural voters, price-sensitive consumers

talking_points.label: Rigged Economy / Billionaire Tax
talking_points.premise: The economy is rigged for the wealthy while working families struggle - billionaires must pay their fair share.
supporting_arguments: Billionaires pay lower effective tax rate than workers
talking_points.target_audience: Working class, progressive base, economically anxious

talking_points.label: Tax Cuts Create Growth
talking_points.premise: Lower taxes create economic growth, jobs, and higher wages - the TCJA must be extended.
supporting_arguments: TCJA led to wage growth and low unemployment
Businesses invest more when taxed less
Americans keep more of their money
talking_points.target_audience: Business owners, suburban voters, middle class

talking_points.label: Corporate Greed / Greedflation
talking_points.premise: Corporations are price gouging and using inflation as cover to jack up prices and boost profits.

talking_points.label: Biden Inflation Crisis
talking_points.premise: Biden's reckless spending and war on energy caused the worst inflation in 40 years.
supporting_arguments: American Rescue Plan flooded economy with money
common_phrases: they broke it, we'll fix it
talking_points.target_audience: All voters, especially those hurt by price increases

talking_points.label: Assault Weapons Ban
talking_points.premise: Weapons of war like AR-15s have no place on our streets and should be banned for civilian use.

talking_points.label: Shall Not Be Infringed
talking_points.premise: The Second Amendment is clear and absolute - any gun control is unconstitutional.
supporting_arguments: Guns don't kill people, people kill people
Law-abiding citizens need to defend themselves

talking_points.label: Public Option / Build on ACA
talking_points.premise: We should build on Obamacare with a public option to increase coverage and lower costs.

talking_points.label: Medicare For All
talking_points.premise: Healthcare is a human right - we need single-payer Medicare for All that covers everyone.
supporting_arguments: Healthcare is a right, not a privilege

talking_points.label: DOGE Is Unconstitutional Power Grab
talking_points.premise: DOGE is an unaccountable shadow government run by unelected billionaires dismantling essential services.
supporting_arguments: Cutting veterans, Social Security, essential services
talking_points.target_audience: Federal workers, beneficiaries of programs, constitutionalists

talking_points.label: Drain The Swamp / Cut Waste
talking_points.premise: DOGE is finally cutting the bloated federal bureaucracy and saving taxpayers trillions.
supporting_arguments: Government is too big and wasteful
talking_points.target_audience: Small government conservatives, MAGA base, taxpayers

talking_points.label: January 6 Was An Insurrection
talking_points.premise: January 6 was a violent insurrection attempting to overturn a legitimate election, incited by Trump.

talking_points.label: J6 Hostages / Political Prisoners
talking_points.premise: January 6 defendants are political prisoners held by a weaponized DOJ for protesting.

talking_points.label: Justice Restored / Pardons
talking_points.premise: Trump pardoned J6 defendants to correct the injustice of political prosecution.

talking_points.label: Trans Rights Are Human Rights
talking_points.premise: Transgender people deserve dignity, respect, and equal protection under law including access to healthcare.
supporting_arguments: Medical decisions belong to families and doctors

talking_points.label: Protect Children / Parents' Rights
talking_points.premise: Children should not receive irreversible gender treatments and parents must be informed and in control.
supporting_arguments: Children cannot consent to permanent changes

talking_points.label: Save Women's Sports
talking_points.premise: Biological males should not compete in women's sports - it's unfair and erases women's achievements.
supporting_arguments: Title IX was meant to protect women
talking_points.target_audience: Female athletes, sports fans, parents of daughters

talking_points.label: Diversity Is Strength
talking_points.premise: Diversity, equity, and inclusion programs help correct historical discrimination and make organizations stronger.

talking_points.label: DEI Is Discrimination
talking_points.premise: DEI programs are reverse racism that discriminate against white and Asian Americans based on skin color.
talking_points.target_audience: White working class, Asian Americans, meritocracy believers

talking_points.label: Tariffs Are a Tax on Americans
talking_points.premise: Trump's tariffs are a hidden tax paid by American consumers and businesses, not foreign countries.
supporting_arguments: Importers pay tariffs, pass to consumers

talking_points.label: Fair Trade / America First
talking_points.premise: Tariffs protect American workers and force other countries to trade fairly with us.
supporting_arguments: Other countries have higher tariffs on us
